/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/points_demonstration.dir/get_points_demonstration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/points_demonstration.dir/get_points.cpp.o CMakeFiles/points_demonstration.dir/classes/Point.cpp.o CMakeFiles/points_demonstration.dir/classes/Matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/points_demonstration.dir/classes/Dataset.cpp.o -o points_demonstration
